task_details.delay_risks: Delays in data analysis impacting the availability of results, slow internal review processes, and difficulty coordinating with co-authors.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Establish a clear timeline for data analysis and internal review, schedule regular meetings with co-authors to ensure progress, and allocate sufficient time for revisions.

task_details.delay_risks: Difficulty in interpreting results, challenges in structuring the manuscript, and delays in receiving feedback from co-authors.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Develop a detailed outline before writing, schedule regular meetings with co-authors to discuss progress and address concerns, and allocate sufficient time for revisions based on feedback.

task_details.delay_risks: Rejection from target journals, lengthy peer review processes, and requests for extensive revisions.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Carefully select target journals based on the scope and impact of the research, thoroughly review and address all reviewer comments, and be prepared to submit to alternative journals if necessary.

{"goal_statement":"Establish a 3-year residential longitudinal research unit in Bonn, Germany, for the study of adult NREM parasomnias, and develop semi-automated event-triage
